2019Opened On Fairview Ave Since

Started by the Shams Sisters

To Bring The Flavors Of Afghanistan To Boise

The Shams sisters, Homeyra, Bahar S. Amir, Khatera, and Narges, were born in Afghanistan. They spent their early childhood there as well as in Iran and Turkey, and eventually immigrated to the United States so they could receive an education. They arrived knowing virtually no English and had to learn that as well as life in the US.

Women-Owned Dine-in · Takeaway · Delivery Gluten-Free Options
Meet The Sisters
